original_prompt: 给这个朱砂手串做一张淘宝主图，要求躺在红色背景里，旁边有一段米色丝带
optimized_prompt:
[Visual Description]
Modern Chinese E-commerce Jewelry Photography. A close-up, high-angle shot of [Subject Lock: A glossy deep red cinnabar bracelet with round, speckled beads, featuring a single translucent peach bead and a vibrant blue cloisonné enamel floral charm]. The bracelet is lying flat on a textured Deep Red Background (matte paper or velvet texture to contrast with the glossy beads). 
[Props]: An elegant, flowing Beige Silk Ribbon winds gently around the bracelet, adding a soft color contrast and leading the eye.
[Lighting]: Professional Commercial Studio Lighting. Softbox lighting creates distinct specular highlights on the spherical beads, emphasizing the 'granular surface texture' and the glossy finish. Shadows are soft and natural.

[Text & UI Layout]
***Layout Style**: Top-Bottom Standard (Classic E-commerce Layout).
Text Rendering Instructions (Must be High Contrast against Red background):
1. **Main Title**: Content: “原矿朱砂”. Position: [Top Left Negative Space]. Style: [Bold 3D Serif font in Brushed Gold texture, suggesting premium quality].
2. **Sub Title**: Content: “招财纳福 · 护身辟邪”. Style: [Clean White Sans-serif, small and sharp below main title].
3. **Marketing Banner**: Content: “本命年必备”. Style: [Vertical tag on the right side, Frosted Glass effect with white text].
4. **Trust Badge**: Content: “国检证书”. Style: [Small Gold Shield icon near the bottom].
layout_logic: Due to the 'Red Product on Red Background' request, lighting contrast is critical. The text must be White or Gold to ensure legibility. The beige ribbon is a crucial compositional element to separate the red beads from the red floor.
